brands.name: Meta
brands.colorUsage: Blue for ALL interactive elements (buttons, links). Gray-100 (#F0F2F5) is THE signature background. White cards on gray background. Blue-to-white gradient only for marketing, never in product. Notification red for badges. Green dot for online status.
brands.typographyScale: H1: 32px/1.2 • H2: 24px/1.25 • H3: 20px/1.3 • Body: 15px/1.34 • Small: 13px/1.38 • Caption: 12px/1.33. Tight line-heights, optimized for dense feeds. No tracking adjustments.
brands.spacing: Base: 8px. Card padding: 16px. Feed gap: 16px. Section margins: 24px. Sidebar width: 280px left, 280px right. Max content: 680px feed width. Very consistent spacing system.
brands.components:
• Cards: White bg, rounded-lg (8px), subtle shadow (0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.1))
• Avatars: Circular, sizes 28/36/40/60/168px, green dot for online (bottom-right)
• Story circles: 56px avatar with gradient ring (blue-purple-pink)
• Reactions: Row of emoji (like, love, haha, wow, sad, angry)
• Comment threads: Nested with gray background bubbles
• Buttons: Rounded-lg, 36px height, blue fill or gray secondary
• Input fields: Gray-100 bg, rounded-full for search, rounded-lg for compose
brands.motion: Quick and snappy, not smooth. Duration: 100-200ms. Ease: ease-out. Reactions: Pop animation. Like button: Quick scale bounce. Loading: Skeleton shimmer (gray pulse). Page transitions: Instant, no animation.
brands.layout: 3-column: Left nav (280px fixed), Feed (flexible, 680px max), Right sidebar (280px fixed). Feed is single-column cards. Mobile: Full-width feed, bottom tab bar. Story tray: Horizontal scroll at top.
brands.iconStyle: Filled icons default, 24px. Rounded, friendly style. Active state: Blue fill. Custom icons for reactions. Notification badges: Red circle with white number.
brands.interactiveStates:
• Hover: Background darken (white → gray-100, gray-100 → gray-200)
• Focus: Blue outline ring (2px)
• Active: Scale 0.96 briefly
• Like button: Blue fill, bounce animation
• Disabled: 40% opacity
• Links: Blue, no underline, underline on hover
brands.copyVoice: Warm, conversational, inclusive. Second-person ('Connect with friends'). Encouraging ('Share what's on your mind'). Simple, accessible language. Never technical. Community-focused.
designPrinciples: Feed is the center of everything

brands.name: Google
brands.colorUsage: Blue for primary actions, links. Four-color logo only in logo contexts. One accent color per section, not all four at once. Gray-700 for body text (NOT black). Colored icons for product differentiation.
brands.typographyScale: Display: 57px/64px • H1: 36px/44px • H2: 28px/36px • H3: 22px/28px • Body: 14px/20px • Body 2: 16px/24px • Caption: 12px/16px. Line-height in px, not ratio.
brands.spacing: Base: 8px. Cards: 24px padding. Section: 48px vertical. Grid gap: 24px. Dense lists: 48px row height. Max-width: 1280px content area. Material Design 8px grid.
brands.components:
• Cards: Rounded-lg (8px), elevation shadows (0 1px 3px, 0 4px 6px)
• Buttons: Rounded-full (pill), 36px height, uppercase text
• FAB: 56px circle, colored, bottom-right
• Chips: Rounded-full, 32px height, outline or filled
• Text fields: Outlined or filled, floating labels
• Search bar: Rounded-full, 44-48px height, shadow on focus
brands.motion: Material Design motion. Duration: 150-300ms. Ease: cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1). Ripple effect on click. Shared axis transitions. Elevation changes animate. FAB: Scale up from 0.
brands.layout: App bar top (64px), bottom nav on mobile. Responsive grid: 4/8/12 columns. Navigation rail on tablet. Drawer navigation. Cards in grids. Search-centric homepage.
brands.iconStyle: Material Icons, 24px default. Outlined or filled variants. 2px stroke for outlined. Rounded style preferred. 5 sizes: 18/20/24/36/48px.
brands.interactiveStates:
• Hover: Gray-100 background, elevation increase
• Focus: Blue outline ring
• Active: Ripple effect spreading from click point
• Pressed: Darker shade, slight scale down
• Disabled: 38% opacity
brands.copyVoice: Helpful, clear, conversational. 'Search for anything.' Short sentences. Action-oriented. Accessible to all education levels. Slightly playful in consumer products.

brands.name: Discord
brands.colorUsage: Blurple for primary actions and accents. Dark grays for all surfaces (NOT pure black). Status colors: Green=online, Yellow=idle, Red=DND, Gray=offline. Fuchsia for Nitro/boosting. White text on dark backgrounds.
brands.typographyScale: H1: 24px/30px/600 • H2: 20px/24px/600 • H3: 16px/20px/600 • Body: 16px/20px • Small: 14px/18px • Tiny: 12px/16px. Consistent 20px line-height for body.
brands.spacing: Base: 4px. Channel list: 4px gap. Messages: 16px padding. Server icons: 48px. Section headers: 12px vertical padding. Dense UI overall.
brands.components:
• Server icons: Rounded square (16px radius), hover → circle
• Channels: # icon + name, hover shows settings
• Messages: Avatar left (40px), content right, hover shows actions
• Voice cards: Users in a list, speaking indicator
• Buttons: Rounded (3px), small (32px height)
• Modals: Dark background, rounded-lg, centered
brands.motion: Playful, bouncy. Ease: cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1). Duration: 200-300ms. Server icon: Squircle → circle on hover. Unread indicators: Slide in. Reactions: Pop scale.
brands.layout: 3-panel: Servers (72px), Channels (240px), Chat (flexible). Fixed top bar. Member list toggleable (240px). Mobile: Tab bar navigation. Voice: Overlay or separate view.
brands.iconStyle: Custom Discord icons, rounded, friendly. 20-24px. Filled when active. Status dots: 10px circles on avatars. Custom emoji support throughout.
brands.interactiveStates:
• Hover: Lighter background (#36393F → #40444B)
• Focus: Blurple outline ring
• Active: Blurple background, white text
• Speaking: Green ring around avatar
• Muted: Strikethrough icon
• Deafened: Slash through headphone icon
brands.copyVoice: Casual, gamer-friendly, playful. Uses gaming slang. Second-person. 'Wumpus' mascot voice. 'Hang out with your friends.' Slightly sarcastic error messages.

brands.name: GitHub
brands.colorUsage: Minimal color, content-focused. Blue for links/actions. Status colors for PR/issue states (green=merged/open, red=closed, purple=done). Code uses syntax highlighting. Gray backgrounds for code blocks. Dark mode inverts all.
brands.typographyScale: H1: 32px/40px/600 • H2: 24px/32px/600 • H3: 20px/28px/600 • Body: 14px/21px • Small: 12px/18px • Mono: 12px-14px. Monospace everywhere code appears.
brands.spacing: Base: 8px. Card padding: 16px. Repository list: 16px gap. Page margins: 24-32px. Max-width: 1280px. Code: 8px padding. Dense tables.
brands.components:
• Repo cards: Border, title + description + stats
• Issues/PRs: Status icon + title + labels (colored pills)
• Code blocks: Gray background, line numbers, syntax highlight
• Buttons: Rounded (6px), green for primary, gray outline for secondary
• Labels: Colored pills, custom colors per repo
• Avatars: Circle, 20-48px, status indicators
brands.motion: Minimal, functional. Duration: 150ms. No playful animations. Diff expansion: Smooth reveal. Dropdowns: Fade + slide. Focus: Immediate, no transition.
brands.layout: Repository-centric. Top nav + user menu. Repo layout: Tabs (Code, Issues, PRs...), sidebar optional. File tree: Collapsible. Code view: Full-width. Max-width containers for readability.
brands.iconStyle: Octicons — 16px and 24px. Simple line icons. Consistent 1.5px stroke. Functional, not decorative. Status icons have color.
brands.interactiveStates:
• Hover: Underline for links, background for buttons (#F3F4F6)
• Focus: Blue outline (2px, offset 2px)
• Active: Darker shade
• Selected: Blue left border (2px)
• Disabled: 50% opacity
brands.copyVoice: Technical, clear, developer-focused. 'Commit changes.' Action-oriented. Documentation style. Never cutesy. Error messages are helpful and specific.

brands.name: Figma
brands.colorUsage: Logo colors for brand moments, NOT UI. Editor is dark gray (#2C2C2C). Canvas is white or transparent grid. Selection: Blue boxes. UI chrome is minimal grays. Multiplayer cursors get unique colors.
brands.typographyScale: H1: 40px/1.2/−0.02em • H2: 32px/1.25 • H3: 24px/1.3 • Body: 14px/1.5 • Small: 12px/1.4 • Panel labels: 11px/1.3 caps. Tiny text in tool panels.
brands.spacing: Base: 8px. Panel padding: 8-12px. Tool rows: 32px height. Section gaps: 16px. Canvas: Infinite, zoom-agnostic. Properties panel: Dense, minimal spacing.
brands.components:
• Toolbar: Horizontal top, icon buttons 32px
• Layers panel: Tree structure, indented items
• Properties panel: Right side, grouped sections
• Cursors: Named colored cursors for each user
• Frames: Blue selection box, resize handles
• Comments: Yellow pin markers, threaded
brands.motion: Smooth and precise. Canvas zoom/pan: Immediate, no easing. Panel transitions: 150ms ease-out. Cursor movements: Real-time, no smoothing. Selection: Instant blue box.
brands.layout: Canvas-centric. Toolbar top, Layers left (collapsible), Properties right (collapsible). Infinite canvas in center. Minimal chrome — canvas is the focus. Tabs for pages/files.
brands.iconStyle: Simple line icons, 16px. Minimal detail. Tool icons are highly specific. Consistent 1.5px stroke. Monochrome (black or gray).
brands.interactiveStates:
• Hover: Slight background highlight (#F5F5F5)
• Focus: Blue outline (1px)
• Selected: Blue fill for tools, blue border for canvas objects
• Active (tool): Blue background pill
• Drag: Ghost element follows cursor
brands.copyVoice: Designer-friendly, clear, minimal. Feature names are verbs ('Auto Layout', 'Prototype'). Documentation is visual. Collaborative tone. 'Design together.'

brands.name: Airbnb
brands.colorUsage: Rausch (coral red) for primary CTAs and brand moments. Teal for success/positive states. Dark gray for text (NOT black). White backgrounds. Photography provides color. Yellow stars for ratings. Minimal color in UI.
brands.typographyScale: Display: 48px/1.1 • H1: 32px/1.2 • H2: 24px/1.25 • H3: 18px/1.3 • Body: 16px/1.5 • Small: 14px/1.5 • Caption: 12px/1.4. Generous line-heights for readability.
brands.spacing: Base: 8px. Card padding: 16-24px. Section margins: 48px. Grid gap: 24px. Page margins: 24px mobile, 80px desktop. Generous whitespace overall.
brands.components:
• Listing cards: Photo carousel, heart icon overlay, price bottom-right
• Search bar: Rounded-full, segmented (Where/When/Who)
• Profile pics: Circles, 24-56px, verification badge
• Star ratings: Filled stars, 1 decimal (4.92)
• Map pins: Brand coral, price inside
• Buttons: Rounded-lg (12px), coral fill or black outline
brands.motion: Smooth, welcoming. Duration: 200-400ms. Ease: ease-in-out. Photo carousels: Smooth slide. Heart: Scale pop + fill on save. Page transitions: Fade. Map: Smooth zoom/pan.
brands.layout: Search-centric homepage. Grid of listing cards (2-6 columns). Listing page: Full-width photos, details below. Sticky booking widget right. Mobile: Full-width cards, bottom sheet booking.
brands.iconStyle: Rounded line icons, 24px. 2px stroke. Friendly, travel-themed. Custom icons for amenities. Heart icon is signature.
brands.interactiveStates:
• Hover: Shadow increase, slight scale 1.02 for cards
• Focus: Black outline ring
• Active: Scale 0.98
• Saved: Heart fills red with animation
• Disabled: 50% opacity
brands.copyVoice: Welcoming, aspirational, personal. 'Belong anywhere.' Host-centric language. Second-person. Descriptions are evocative. Trust and safety emphasized.

brands.name: Uber
brands.colorUsage: Black and white foundation. Black buttons, white backgrounds. Map is the UI — color comes from the map. Green for Eats. Blue for informational. Minimal color in ride UI to reduce distraction.
brands.typographyScale: Display: 52px/1.1 • H1: 36px/1.15 • H2: 24px/1.25 • H3: 18px/1.3 • Body: 16px/1.5 • Small: 14px/1.4. Clean, legible scale.
brands.spacing: Base: 8px. Card padding: 16px. Bottom sheet: 24px padding. List items: 56px height. Map takes most of screen. Minimal UI chrome.
brands.components:
• Map: Full-screen, minimal overlays
• Destination input: Prominent search bar top
• Driver cards: Photo + name + rating + car
• Ride options: Horizontal scroll cards, price visible
• Bottom sheet: Rounded top, draggable
• Buttons: Pill shape, black fill, 48-56px height
brands.motion: Smooth, purposeful. Map animations: Continuous. Car icons: Real-time movement. Bottom sheets: Spring physics. Ride request: Progress animation. Duration: 200-400ms.
brands.layout: Map-centric. Destination input at top. Bottom sheet for ride options. Full-screen map behind. Driver arriving: Card overlay. Mobile-first, minimal desktop.
brands.iconStyle: Simple line icons, 24px. Minimal detail. Vehicle types are illustrated. 2px stroke. Monochrome default.
brands.interactiveStates:
• Hover: Background darken (for non-map elements)
• Focus: Black outline ring
• Selected: Black fill, white text
• Active: Scale 0.98
• Disabled: 40% opacity
brands.copyVoice: Clear, direct, action-oriented. 'Where to?' 'Request ride.' Minimal words. Safety messaging is prominent. International-friendly, simple language.

brands.name: Slack
brands.colorUsage: Aubergine sidebar is signature. Four colors from logo used as accents throughout. Green for online. Red for unread/alerts. Yellow for starred. Custom themes allow workspace personalization. White message area.
brands.typographyScale: H1: 28px/1.2 • H2: 22px/1.25 • H3: 18px/1.3 • Body: 15px/1.46 • Small: 13px/1.38 • Tiny: 12px/1.33. Comfortable reading in message threads.
brands.spacing: Base: 4px. Message padding: 8px vertical. Channel sidebar: 8px item height. Section gaps: 16px. Compact mode reduces spacing 20%.
brands.components:
• Messages: Avatar (36px) + name + timestamp + content
• Channels: # prefix, unread bold + badge
• Threads: Indented replies, collapse/expand
• Reactions: Emoji row below message
• Huddles: Audio indicator, avatar stack
• Buttons: Rounded (4px), teal or gray
brands.motion: Quick, functional. Duration: 100-200ms. Message send: Instant appear. Threads: Slide open. Emoji reactions: Pop + settle. Notifications: Slide in from right.
brands.layout: 3-column: Workspaces (60px), Channels (260px), Messages (flexible). Thread panel: Right side (400px). Mobile: Single panel with navigation. Top bar: Search + profile.
brands.iconStyle: Simple, friendly icons. 20px default. Rounded style. Custom emoji support. Status icons use brand colors. Hash (#) for channels, @ for mentions.
brands.interactiveStates:
• Hover: Background highlight, show message actions
• Focus: Blue outline ring
• Unread: Bold channel name, white dot
• Active channel: Aubergine background (on light theme)
• Mention: Yellow highlight
• Typing: Animated dots
brands.copyVoice: Friendly, slightly playful, work-appropriate. 'Where work happens.' Uses emoji naturally. Celebrates with confetti. Helpful error messages. Slightly irreverent.

brands.name: Shopify
brands.colorUsage: Blue for interactive elements (Polaris system). Green for success states. Admin is light and neutral. Storefront themes are customizable. Critical red for errors. Muted, professional palette.
brands.typographyScale: Display: 27px/32px • H1: 21px/28px • H2: 16px/24px • Body: 14px/20px • Caption: 12px/16px. Compact scale for admin density.
brands.spacing: Base: 4px. Card padding: 16px. Section gaps: 16px. List items: 40px height. Page margins: 32px. Polaris spacing tokens: tight/base/loose.
brands.components:
• Cards: White bg, rounded (8px), subtle border
• Data tables: Striped rows, sortable headers
• Buttons: Rounded (4px), primary green/blue, secondary gray
• Badges: Colored pills for status
• Forms: Labeled inputs, validation inline
• Modals: Centered, rounded, backdrop blur
brands.motion: Subtle, functional. Duration: 150-200ms. Page transitions: Fade. Modals: Scale + fade. Dropdowns: Slide down. Loading: Skeleton shimmer. Toast: Slide from bottom.
brands.layout: Admin layout: Top bar + side nav (240px) + content. Dashboard: Cards grid. Product list: Data table. Settings: Sectioned form. Mobile: Bottom nav.
brands.iconStyle: Polaris icons, 20px. Simple line icons. 1.5px stroke. Functional, not decorative. Status colors applied to icons.
brands.interactiveStates:
• Hover: Background darken, underline for links
• Focus: Blue outline ring (2px, offset 1px)
• Active: Darker shade
• Loading: Spinner replaces text
• Disabled: 50% opacity, cursor not-allowed
brands.copyVoice: Merchant-focused, encouraging. 'Build your business.' Helpful guidance. Clear actions. Success celebrates. Errors explain how to fix.
designPrinciples: Admin is a tool, not a destination

brands.name: Vercel
brands.colorUsage: Black and white foundation. Blue for links only. Cyan for special highlights/marketing. Terminal aesthetic — dark code blocks. Error red is pure. No gradients in product.
brands.typographyScale: Display: 64px/1.1/−0.02em • H1: 48px/1.15 • H2: 32px/1.2 • H3: 24px/1.25 • Body: 16px/1.6 • Small: 14px/1.5 • Mono: 14px/1.6. Generous line-heights.
brands.spacing: Base: 8px. Card padding: 24px. Section margins: 64px. Grid gap: 24px. Max-width: 1200px. Code blocks: 16px padding.
brands.components:
• Cards: Border (1px gray-200), rounded (8px), white bg
• Code blocks: Dark bg (#000), syntax highlighted
• Buttons: Rounded (5px), black fill or border
• Terminal: Dark with colored output
• Deployment cards: Status indicator + URL + time
• Triangle logo: Animated on load
brands.motion: Minimal, refined. Duration: 200ms. Ease: ease-out. Page transitions: Fade. Triangle: Subtle rotation on hover. Deploy animation: Progress bar. No playful animations.
brands.layout: Dashboard: Nav left (200px), content flexible. Project page: Overview + deployments + settings tabs. Marketing: Centered content, full-width sections. Max-width containers.
brands.iconStyle: Minimal line icons, 20px. 1.5px stroke. Geometric. Triangle is the brand mark. Monochrome (black or gray).
brands.interactiveStates:
• Hover: Background gray-100, border darken
• Focus: Blue outline ring
• Active: Scale 0.98
• Loading: Skeleton shimmer
• Deployed: Blue checkmark
brands.copyVoice: Developer-focused, confident. 'Develop. Preview. Ship.' Short, punchy statements. Technical but not alienating. Framework-aware.

brands.name: OpenAI
brands.colorUsage: Minimal color palette. Green for ChatGPT brand and positive actions. Black/white for everything else. Dark mode uses near-black grays. No gradients. Code blocks use standard syntax highlighting.
brands.typographyScale: H1: 40px/1.2 • H2: 32px/1.25 • H3: 24px/1.3 • Body: 16px/1.6 • Chat: 16px/1.75 • Small: 14px/1.5 • Mono: 14px/1.6. Generous line-heights for readability.
brands.spacing: Base: 8px. Chat bubbles: 16px padding. Sidebar: 12px padding. Message gap: 24px. Max-width: 768px for chat. Research pages: 680px content width.
brands.components:
• Chat bubbles: User right (no bg), AI left (light bg or no bg)
• Code blocks: Dark bg, copy button, language label
• Sidebar: Conversation history list
• Input: Full-width, rounded, send button right
• Model selector: Dropdown, model icons
• Buttons: Rounded (6px), green fill or gray outline
brands.motion: Subtle, purposeful. Duration: 200ms. Chat messages: Fade in + slide up. Typing indicator: Animated dots. Code blocks: Syntax highlight progressive. No playful animations.
brands.layout: Chat-centric. Sidebar left (260px collapsible), chat center (max 768px), empty right. Research site: Centered content, minimal nav. API docs: Left nav + content.
brands.iconStyle: Simple, minimal icons. 20px. 1.5px stroke. Geometric shapes. ChatGPT logo: Abstract knot. Functional, not decorative.
brands.interactiveStates:
• Hover: Background lighten (on dark), darken (on light)
• Focus: Green outline ring
• Active: Slight darken
• Regenerating: Spinner
• Streaming: Cursor blink at end of text
brands.copyVoice: Research-oriented, accessible, hopeful. 'Introducing ChatGPT.' Clear, educational. Safety-conscious. Avoids hype. Mission-driven.

brands.name: Netflix
brands.colorUsage: Red ONLY for brand moments and primary CTAs. Black background always. Content thumbnails provide color. Text is white on dark. Minimal UI chrome — content is the interface.
brands.typographyScale: Display: 56px/1.1 • H1: 40px/1.15 • H2: 28px/1.2 • Body: 16px/1.5 • Small: 14px/1.4 • UI: 12px/1.3. Bold headlines, subtle body text.
brands.spacing: Base: 8px. Row gap: 4-8px. Section titles: 24px padding. Card gaps: 4px. Full-bleed rows. Minimal margins.
brands.components:
• Title cards: 16:9 thumbnail, hover expands with info
• Billboard: Full-width hero, play/info buttons
• Progress bars: Red fill, thin
• Profile icons: Rounded squares, colorful
• Top 10 badges: Red with number
• Player controls: Minimal, auto-hide
brands.motion: Cinematic, smooth. Duration: 300-500ms. Card hover: Scale 1.3 + z-index raise. Billboard: Ken Burns slow zoom. Transitions: Crossfade. Player: Controls fade in/out.
brands.layout: Full-screen content. Horizontal scrolling rows. Billboard hero at top. Categories as rows. Video player is fullscreen takeover. Mobile: Vertical scroll, smaller cards.
brands.iconStyle: Simple white icons, 24px. Play triangle is signature. Minimal detail. Icons only visible on hover or in player.
brands.interactiveStates:
• Hover: Scale 1.3, show info card, z-index above neighbors
• Focus: White outline ring
• Playing: Red progress bar
• Buffering: Spinner
• Watched: Gray checkmark, progress shown
brands.copyVoice: Entertainment-focused, minimal. 'Watch anywhere.' Genre labels. Match % for recommendations. Episode descriptions are concise. No hard sell.

brands.name: Amazon
brands.colorUsage: Orange for add-to-cart and primary CTAs. Dark header/footer. White content areas. Blue for text links. Red for deals/discounts. Prime blue for Prime benefits. Dense, information-rich.
brands.typographyScale: H1: 28px/1.2 • H2: 21px/1.25 • H3: 17px/1.3 • Body: 14px/1.4 • Small: 12px/1.3 • Price: 18-28px bold. Compact, information-dense.
brands.spacing: Base: 4px. Card padding: 12px. Section margins: 16px. Dense layouts. Minimal whitespace. Grid gaps: 12-16px.
brands.components:
• Product cards: Image + title + rating + price + Prime badge
• Star ratings: Orange filled stars, count in parentheses
• Add to Cart: Orange button, full width
• Buy Now: Yellow button
• Prime badge: Blue checkmark
• Carousels: Arrow navigation, peek next item
• Search: Full-width, category dropdown
brands.motion: Minimal, functional. Page loads: Instant. Carousels: Smooth scroll. Add to Cart: Subtle feedback. No decorative animations. Speed is priority.
brands.layout: Dense grid layouts. Multiple carousels per page. Sidebar filters on search. Product page: Images left, details right. Mega menus for navigation. Mobile: Single column, sticky buy bar.
brands.iconStyle: Simple, functional icons. 20px. Minimal detail. Cart icon with count badge. Prime checkmark. Delivery truck. Rating stars.
brands.interactiveStates:
• Hover: Blue text darkens, orange buttons darken
• Focus: Blue outline ring
• Active: Button darkens
• Disabled: Grayed out
• Loading: Spinner
• In Cart: Green checkmark
brands.copyVoice: Direct, informational, deal-focused. Prices prominent. 'FREE delivery.' 'Only X left in stock.' Urgency tactics. Customer reviews emphasized.
